summary.zh: 贯通医学影像、靶点规划、刺激仿真与 EEG 验证的患者中心化工作站。
summary.en: A patient-centered workstation connecting medical imaging, target planning, stimulation simulation, and EEG validation.

description.zh: 面向脑科学研究与临床辅助场景的一体化医学影像工作站。系统以患者数据为中心，串联影像查看、重建分割、靶点与入射路径规划、影像引导刺激仿真、EEG 波形对比和辅助报告归档，让多模态数据与关键操作集中在同一条工作流中。
description.en: An integrated medical imaging workstation for neuroscience research and clinical support. It organizes multimodal data around each patient and connects image review, reconstruction and segmentation, target and entry-path planning, image-guided stimulation simulation, EEG waveform comparison, and assisted report archiving in one workflow.

role.zh: 产品设计、医学影像工作流设计、交互界面与系统实现
role.en: Product design, medical imaging workflow design, interface design, and system implementation

outcome.zh: 完成覆盖患者工作区、影像处理、靶点规划、刺激仿真、EEG 验证和辅助报告的一体化工作站方案。
outcome.en: Completed an integrated workstation concept spanning patient workspaces, image processing, target planning, stimulation simulation, EEG validation, and assisted reporting.

alt.zh: BCI 医学影像工作站的影像、规划、仿真与 EEG 验证总览
alt.en: Overview of imaging, planning, simulation, and EEG validation in the BCI workstation

alt.zh: 从患者工作区到辅助报告的患者中心化一体化工作流
alt.en: Patient-centered workflow from patient workspace to assisted reporting

alt.zh: 基于多平面医学影像的脑部靶点与入射路径规划
alt.en: Brain target and entry-path planning using multiplanar medical images

alt.zh: 结合组织模型与聚焦分布的影像引导刺激仿真
alt.en: Image-guided stimulation simulation with tissue models and focus distribution

alt.zh: EEG 波形、头皮地形图、趋势分析与辅助报告界面
alt.en: EEG waveforms, scalp maps, trend analysis, and assisted reporting interface
